coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of SQL and relational databases
Elementary knowledge of data modeling concepts
Ability to write simple SELECT queries with joins
Basic understanding of the ETL and ELT approach
Familiarity with version control using Git
Elementary knowledge of data quality and validation
Basic understanding of analytical use cases
Ability to read and interpret existing data models
complementaryCompetencies: Basic knowledge of a BI tool (Looker, Tableau, Power BI)
Familiarity with spreadsheets and pivot tables
Elementary understanding of descriptive statistics
indicators: Requires constant supervision in modeling tasks
Can run and modify existing SQL transformations
Needs 3-6 months of mentoring in analytics engineering

complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake)
Ability to build simple dashboards

indicators: Can build modular transformations with supervision
Resolves common data quality issues in models
